title: FreeCursor
description: Instantly release cursor with a keybind
body:
Release mouse cursor via hotkey.
## Features - Customizable keybind (F6 by default) - Return via LMB or ESC - HUD hiding (Simulate F1) - Background blur removal - English and Russian localization ## Usage 1. Press **F6** (or your custom key) to release the cursor. 2. Press **LMB** or **ESC** to return.
## Configuration ### Keybind: `Options > Controls > Key Binds > FreeCursor` ### Settings: - **In-game:** Press **N** to open built-in config. - **ModMenu:** Configure via ModMenu interface.
